message:
style(e2e/realdb_e2e): allow too_many_arguments on resolve_bench_matrix_selection

Trailing clippy nit on the bench matrix resolver in the realdb-e2e
binary.  resolve_bench_matrix_selection takes the parsed CLI flag
set (golden dir, golden_dir_overridden, run_mode, run_id, fixture
filter, lane filter, ...).  Bundling them into a struct would force
the entire CLI parser through an extra builder layer for no
readability win, and the function is called from exactly one site.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
